archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast - Functional variant adapted to Timber industry)

typography.notes: IBM Plex Mono is a FUNCTIONAL requirement for all numeric inputs, calculations, and tables to ensure tabular alignment. Headings should be clear and highly legible.

cbm1.description: Blue for CBM1/CFT1 columns and calculations

cbm2.description: Green for CBM2/CFT2 columns and calculations

totals.description: Amber for running totals and grand totals

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. p-4 to p-6 for cards. Minimum 48px tap targets for mobile.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Grid columns 1 for mobile, md:grid-cols-2 or md:grid-cols-3 for desktop. Dashboard uses bento-like dense grid for KPIs.

navigation.mobile: Fixed bottom navigation (h-16) with large icons and minimal text. Top header for title/avatar.
navigation.desktop: Top navigation bar (h-16). Hide bottom nav on desktop.

buttons.primary: h-14 sm:h-12 text-lg rounded-md bg-[#064E3B] text-white hover:bg-[#047857] shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center font-bold px-6
buttons.secondary: h-14 sm:h-12 text-lg rounded-md bg-white border-2 border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 flex items-center justify-center font-bold px-6
buttons.massive_action: h-16 text-xl rounded-xl bg-[#064E3B] text-white w-full

inputs.default: h-14 rounded-md border-2 border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 text-lg focus:border-[#064E3B] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#064E3B]/20
inputs.numeric: h-14 rounded-md border-2 border-slate-300 bg-white px-2 text-xl font-mono text-center focus:border-[#064E3B] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#064E3B]/20

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-4 sm:p-6 overflow-hidden
cards.measurement_row: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-4 mb-4

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm sm:text-base font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border-2

icons.usage: Use large stroke-width (2.5 or 3) for better visibility. Icons must accompany primary actions to aid low-education users.

login_background.description: Timber logging forest background for the login screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup App Layout: Ensure mobile-first design. Use a fixed bottom navigation on mobile (hidden on desktop) and a top navigation on desktop (hidden on mobile). Include user initials avatar in the header.
2. Typography: You MUST use IBM Plex Mono for all numeric values, inputs, and calculations. Use IBM Plex Sans for general text.

3. Page 1 - Purchases: List view of Bill of Ladings (BL). Each item needs large status badges (Pending, In Progress, Complete). Add/Edit modal should allow dynamic addition of container rows. Minimal typing, large buttons.

4. Page 2 - Measurements: The core data entry page. Select BL + Container first. Show a sticky/fixed running totals bar (Pieces, CBM1, CFT1, CBM2, CFT2, Avg) using the functional colors: Blue for CBM1/CFT1, Green for CBM2/CFT2, Amber for Totals.

5. Page 2 - Log Cards: Render multi-log entry cards. Each card must have 4 large numeric inputs: LE1, L, G1, G2. Use font-mono. Below the inputs in the same card, show live calculated CBM1/CFT1 (in blue text) and CBM2/CFT2 (in green text). If G1 or G2 < 35, add orange warning border to the input.
6. Page 2 - Actions: Include massive 'Add Log' and 'Add 5 Logs' buttons at the bottom of the list. Include a toggle to mark container as complete.
7. Page 3 - Dashboard: Show KPI chips at the top (Total BLs, Containers, Pieces, CBM1, CFT1, CBM2). Below, render BL-grouped expandable cards with container details.
8. Export: Provide 'Export to Excel' buttons (per BL, per container, and All) on the Dashboard using standard icons.
9. Accessibility/Testing: EVERY interactive element (buttons, inputs, tabs, selects) and key data display MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="add-log-button"`).
10. Interactivity: Avoid complex HTML inputs like `<input type="date">` or `<select>`, use Shadcn components but style them heavily to match the h-14 large-touch-target requirement.
11. Contrast: Ensure high contrast. The app is used by industrial workers, potentially outdoors.
